data.name: Suvi The Blossoming Lust
data.detailed_description:
In Laurinor, a land beyond the sea, lies an enchanted realm where myths and legends come lustfully together, the dwelling place of Suvi the Pixie! Play the role of Eros, the God of Love and Lust, in this world of mesmerizing lust and wonder, within a sensual and inviting atmosphere full of luscious animations, to be explored through different scenarios, voice actresses, and character customization!

Do you want to know a little more about Suvi? She is the most adorable and mischievous pointy-eared girl, with a mesmerizing charm, the embodiment of sensual dreams! She can change her looks and voice just for you! Always eager to surprise and entangle you in her spell, she’s very talented, you know?

"Heya! I’m Suvi, the Pixie!

Yes! The tales are true, I do exist!

I like berries and daisies,

Lights and twinkles!

Today Eros, the God of Lust, will visit me…

Yes, to have fun!

And make him fall under my spell!

I have a blossoming lust inside me…

I wish you were Him!"

FEATURES

✿ Simple gameplay;

✿ Multiple camera angles;

✿ Immersive world and rich animations;

✿ Unique and customizable protagonist;

✿ English and French voices performed by Midnight Datura, Pixie Willow, and Steve Hamm;

✿ Two scenarios to play the adventure: The Enchanted Forest and the Chamber of Delights;

✿ High-quality accessible to everyone, from any browser, desktop, or mobile. No powerful machine is needed!

data.short_description: An enchanting world of lust and wonder, and the most stunning girl to fall in love with! An adult little game to sit back, relax, and enjoy the sexiest scenes!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 1GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated GPU
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 備註: Internet connection and a Modern Browser are required

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 備註: Modern Browser

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 備註: Modern Browser
